messages.subject: [Typesense Cloud] Payment failed — action required
messages.body_text:
Hi there,

We were unable to process your payment for Typesense Cloud (account: vectrix-labs).

Amount due: $59.00
Date attempted: January 18, 2026
Failure reason: Card declined

Please update your payment method at https://cloud.typesense.org/billing to avoid service interruption. Your account will be suspended in 7 days if payment is not received.

If you believe this is an error, contact support@typesense.io.

— Typesense Cloud Billing
https://cloud.typesense.org

messages.subject: Fwd: [Typesense Cloud] Payment failed — can you update the card?
messages.body_text:
Priya,

Forwarding — the Typesense Cloud payment failed. Our company card got a new expiry last month and I think that's what happened.

Can you log into the billing portal and update the card? Link is in the email below. Account suspends in 7 days if we don't fix it.

[Forwarded message below]

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io

messages.subject: [Typesense Cloud] Payment successful — INV-2026-01-Typesense
messages.body_text:
Hi there,

Your payment has been successfully processed.

Amount: $59.00
Date: January 19, 2026
Invoice: INV-2026-01-Typesense.pdf

Thank you for updating your billing information. Your account is in good standing.

— Typesense Cloud Billing
